heading: BUREAU OF INDIAN AFFAIRS
label: 1 BUREAU OF INDIAN AFFAIRS
notes: National Council on Indian Opportunity; Appropriations Authorization; Termination Date, , , provided for annual appropriations of $300,000 and a termination date of for the National Council on Indian Opportunity which was established by Ex. Ord. 11399.Pub. L. 91–12583 Stat. 220Nov. 26, 1969Nov. 26, 1974

Executive Order No. 11399Ex. Ord. No. 11399, , 33 F.R. 4245, as amended by Ex. Ord. 11551, , 35 F.R. 12885; Ex. Ord. No. 11688, , 37 F.R. 25815, established the National Council on Indian Opportunity and provided for the functions, compensation, assistance, and meetings with respect to the Council.Mar. 6, 1968Aug. 11, 1970Dec. 1, 1972
